calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-30-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-29-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-23-2014 Set For Trial On Aug-03-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOSEPH J. APPEL of Appel Law Firm LLP, Tel No. (925) 938-2000 appearing for the Plaintiffs;
Atty. BRIAN F. ZIMMERMAN of Zimmerman & Kahanowitch, Tel No. (818) 710-7777 appearing telephonically for Defendant Cahill Contractors, Inc.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT CAHILL CONTRACTORS INC.'S Motion for Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication, Plaintiff Lozier was an employee of a fire-sprinkler subcontractor of general contractor Cahill who slipped and fell on a ramp at Cahill's jobsite. There are triable issues of material fact as to whether Cahill (1) retained control of the ramp where the accident took place; and (2) negligently exercised that control in a manner that affirmatively contributed to Plaintiff's injury. See, e.g., pp. 6-10 of Plaintiffs' Opposition to Cahill's Separate Statement of Material Facts; see also McKown, 27 Cal. 4th 219; CACI 1009D. Cahill's motion for summary judgment is DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-10-2015 Continued To Apr-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CAHILL CONTRACTORS INC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is continued on the Court's motion to April 13, 2015. Judge : Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg
